title: Lily's Garden Friends
synopsis: Lily discovers that making friends in her garden is as easy as being kind and sharing. When she meets a shy bunny and busy squirrel, she learns that friendship grows best when we care for each other and nature together.

pages.text: Lily loved playing in her backyard garden. The flowers were bright and the grass was soft under her feet.

illustration.description: A little girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes playing in a colorful garden with bright flowers, green grass, and sunny skies in primary colors with white space, joyful energetic style
illustration.alt: Lily playing happily in a bright garden

pages.text: One morning, Lily saw a small brown bunny hiding behind the big sunflower. The bunny looked scared and lonely.

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes discovering a shy brown bunny behind a tall yellow sunflower in a bright sunny garden with primary colors, white space, inclusive friendly atmosphere
illustration.alt: Lily finding a shy bunny in the garden

pages.text: "Hello, little bunny," said Lily softly. "Would you like to be my friend?" The bunny's nose twitched, but it stayed hidden.

illustration.description: A kind girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes kneeling down and speaking gently to a brown bunny among bright flowers in primary colors with white space, joyful energetic park-like setting
illustration.alt: Lily speaking kindly to the bunny

pages.text: Lily picked some fresh clover and placed it near the bunny. "Here's a yummy snack," she whispered. The bunny hopped closer and nibbled the clover.

illustration.description: A generous girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes offering green clover to a brown bunny in a bright sunny garden with primary colors, white space, friendship activities in inclusive joyful style
illustration.alt: Lily sharing clover with the bunny

pages.text: Soon a gray squirrel came down from the oak tree. "Can I have some clover too?" asked the squirrel. "Of course!" said Lily, picking more clover.

illustration.description: A happy girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes with a brown bunny and gray squirrel sharing clover under an oak tree in bright primary colors with white space, diverse animal friends, joyful energetic playground-like garden
illustration.alt: Lily, bunny, and squirrel sharing food together

pages.text: The three friends played hide-and-seek among the flowers. They laughed and ran through the garden paths together.

illustration.description: A playful girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes playing hide-and-seek with a bunny and squirrel among colorful flowers in primary colors with white space, laughter and friendship activities in bright sunny inclusive style
illustration.alt: Friends playing hide-and-seek in the garden

pages.text: When it was time for lunch, Lily shared her apple slices. "Friends always share," she said with a big smile.

illustration.description: A caring girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes sharing apple slices with a bunny and squirrel in a bright garden with primary colors, white space, friendship activities showing sharing and kindness in joyful energetic style
illustration.alt: Lily sharing her lunch with her animal friends

pages.text: Every day, Lily visited her garden friends. They watered the plants together and watched the flowers grow, just like their friendship.

illustration.description: A happy girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes watering plants with a bunny and squirrel in a lush garden with bright flowers in primary colors, white space, inclusive friendship activities in bright sunny joyful energetic style
illustration.alt: Lily and friends caring for the garden together

metadata.illustrationStyle: bright sunny playground, diverse kids playing, primary colors, white space, joyful energetic, inclusive, park swings slides, laughter, friendship activities

questions.question: Where did the bunny hide?
questions.explanation: The bunny was hiding behind the big sunflower when Lily first saw it.

questions.question: What did Lily give the bunny first?
questions.explanation: Lily picked fresh clover and placed it near the bunny to help make friends.

questions.question: What game did the friends play?
questions.explanation: The three friends played hide-and-seek among the flowers in the garden.

questions.question: What did Lily share at lunch?
questions.explanation: Lily shared her apple slices with her animal friends during lunch time.
